EXAMPLE 1: 

The HHA acquires an oral order for I.V. medication administration for a patient to be 
performed on August 1. The HHA provides the I.V. medication administration August 1 
and evaluates the patient's need for continued care. The physician or allowed practitioner 
signs the plan of care for the I.V. medication administration on August 15. The
